section.title: News
section.subtitle: Updates and Announcements
section.description: Latest HUMACH Research updates across website releases, research directions, development work, publications, internship calls, team activity, workshops, and collaboration news.

items.title: Contact and collaboration gateway added for HUMACH inquiries
items.summary: A dedicated contact page was added to guide research, development, internship, publication, and collaboration inquiries.
items.details: The page uses structured contact pathways and contact.json so future communication routes, methods, and checklists can be updated without rewriting page HTML.
items.audience: Students, collaborators, developers, researchers, and partner organizations

items.title: Publications directory prepared for verified research outputs
items.summary: A dedicated publications page was added to organize journals, conference papers, technical reports, software papers, datasets, and student outputs.
items.details: The page uses structured JSON content so future publication metadata, DOI links, code links, venues, and related projects can be updated without rewriting HTML.
items.audience: Researchers, students, collaborators, and publication contributors

items.title: Team directory added for researchers, developers, interns, and collaborators
items.summary: The website now includes a structured team page with roles for leadership, researchers, developers, interns, students, collaborators, and alumni.
items.details: Team profiles can highlight photos, interests, connected projects, outputs, and contact pathways as HUMACH grows.
items.audience: Current members, future members, collaborators, and visitors

items.title: Opportunity pathways created for internships, thesis projects, and collaboration
items.summary: The opportunities page now presents research internships, development internships, thesis supervision, volunteer research assistance, and collaboration routes.
items.details: Each pathway can include expected skills, contribution modes, outputs, topics, and application instructions through the JSON data layer.
items.audience: Students, developers, early researchers, and external collaborators

items.title: Development page launched for prototypes, dashboards, tools, and AI systems
items.summary: HUMACH now has a dedicated development page for software tools, AI prototypes, research dashboards, data pipelines, and deployable systems.
items.details: The page helps separate practical engineering work from research-area descriptions while keeping both connected through projects and outputs.
items.audience: Developers, interns, research engineers, and collaborators

items.title: Project directory added for active, completed, and recruiting work
items.summary: The projects page now supports filterable cards for research projects, development projects, healthcare AI work, data science, education, and recruiting topics.
items.details: Projects can connect to research areas, teams, publications, GitHub links, demos, and future application pathways.
items.audience: Project contributors, interns, researchers, and collaborators

items.title: Research areas page created for HUMACH scientific scope
items.summary: The research page now presents HUMACH themes across AI, machine learning, biomedical computing, health informatics, NLP, GenAI, software engineering, and education technology.
items.details: Each area can connect to topics, projects, publications, and student opportunities through structured content.
items.audience: Researchers, students, supervisors, and partner organizations

items.title: HUMACH data-driven website structure created
items.summary: The website now includes JSON files for research areas, projects, team profiles, publications, opportunities, development categories, and news.
items.details: This makes the static site easier to maintain because content can be edited in data files instead of copied into multiple HTML pages.
items.audience: Website maintainers and future HUMACH contributors

channels.name: Research Updates
channels.summary: New themes, project directions, papers, experiments, datasets, and research milestones.

channels.name: Development Updates
channels.summary: New prototypes, dashboards, tools, open-source releases, and deployment progress.

channels.name: Opportunity Calls
channels.summary: Internship calls, thesis topics, collaboration openings, and student contribution pathways.

channels.name: Team and Community
channels.summary: Member profiles, collaborator updates, workshops, seminars, and community activities.

workflow.title: Capture
workflow.summary: Record the update as a structured item with title, date, type, category, summary, details, and links.

workflow.title: Classify
workflow.summary: Assign tags such as Research, Development, Publications, Opportunity, Team, Website, or Collaboration.

workflow.title: Connect
workflow.summary: Link the update to relevant pages, projects, publications, opportunities, team profiles, or external forms.

workflow.title: Publish
workflow.summary: Publish updates as announcements, calls, releases, achievements, or project milestones for the HUMACH community.
